name: Kyoko Kirigiri & Naoto Shirogane
description:
Kyoko Kirigiri is one of the main protagonists of the Danganronpa series. She is a student in Hope's Peak Academy's Class 78th, and a participant of the Killing School Life. She is the Ultimate Detective. Birthday: October 6. Age: 19. Likes: Hair braids. Dislikes: Goya, coriander.

Naoto Shirogane is a protagonist from the Persona series. She is the fifth generation of the famed Shirogane family of detectives. Birthday: April 27, 1995. Age: 19. Likes: Mystery novels, logic, high places, Creed, 3 Doors Down, Daughtry, (She is embarrassed by her love for these 3 bands). Dislikes: Throwing things away, being treated like a child, sexism, being looked down.

Watch Kamen Rider W, it's Absolute Cinema.

Art belongs to VCRiot on Newgrounds.

On an unrelated note, the songs to associate with some characters include "Simple Man" by Lynyrd Skynyrd (for Shirou Emiya), "Living Dead Girl" by Rob Zombie (for Junko Enoshima), "Determined" by Mudvayne (for Katsuki Bakugou), "Like a Stone" by Audioslave (for Sayori), "Ace of Spades" by Motorhead (for Yumeko Jabami), "Fade to Black" by Metallica (for Sumire Yoshizawa), "Hero" by Chad Kroeger (ft. Josey Scott) (for Cure Sky), "Getting Away with Murder" by Papa Roach (for Yuno Gasai), and "Cult of Personality" by Living Colour (for Makima).
creator: SailorMoonFan2001
